# MITTAL.WEBSITE

> Founder-led web design studio based in Delhi NCR, India. We build custom websites, e-commerce stores, and web applications that help businesses attract customers and convert visitors into leads. Fixed pricing from ₹5,555. Every project is designed from scratch — no templates.

## About

MITTAL.WEBSITE is a boutique web development agency founded by Shubham Mittal. We serve businesses across Delhi NCR (Delhi, Noida, Gurugram, Ghaziabad, Faridabad) and all of India remotely. Our approach is founder-led — clients communicate directly with the studio founder, not account managers.

### Key Differentiators
- **Custom design from scratch** — no templates, no themes with logo swaps. Every site is unique.
- **Fixed transparent pricing** — starting from ₹5,555 (Starter) to ₹14,999+ (E-Commerce). No hidden charges.
- **10-day average delivery** — most projects launch within 10 business days.
- **100% ownership** — clients own all code, domain, and hosting after final payment. No lock-in.
- **Founder-led communication** — direct WhatsApp communication with the founder.
- **50/50 payment** — 50% advance, 50% on completion after client approval.

## Services & Pricing

| Service | Price | Market Rate | Description |
|---------|-------|-------------|-------------|
| Starter Website | ₹5,555 | ~₹15,000 | Up to 5 pages, responsive, contact form, WhatsApp integration, basic SEO |
| Business Website | ₹9,999 | ~₹30,000 | Premium custom design, lead generation, SEO structure, animations, priority delivery |
| E-Commerce Website | from ₹14,999 | ~₹50,000 | Product catalog, cart, payment gateway, admin panel, order management |
| Brand Growth Package | ₹6,999/month | ~₹15,000/mo | 12 premium creatives, content strategy, branding, WhatsApp lead-gen |
| SEO Foundation | from ₹4,999 | ~₹12,000 | Meta optimization, schema markup, sitemap, technical audit, local SEO |
| Custom Solutions | Custom quote | Varies | AI automation, dashboards, CRM systems, internal tools |

## Process

1. **Discovery call** — 15-minute WhatsApp call to understand business, goals, and requirements.
2. **Design & build** — Custom design from scratch with live staging preview.
3. **Review & refine** — Client reviews on staging, 2 revision rounds included.
4. **Launch & handoff** — Site goes live, client owns everything.

## FAQ

**What does fixed pricing mean?**
The quoted price is the final price. No surprise charges for revisions, meetings, or discussed scope.

**Do I own everything?**
Yes. After final payment, you own the code, domain, and hosting accounts. No lock-in.

**How long does delivery take?**
Most projects launch in ~10 business days. Complex apps may take longer — timeline is agreed before starting.

**What's the payment structure?**
50% advance to start, 50% after approval on staging. You never pay full before seeing the final product.

**Can I see my site before launch?**
Always. You get a staging preview, request changes (2 rounds), and approve before going public.

**Do you redesign existing sites?**
Yes. Same pricing applies based on the scope of the new site.
